simple_types.name: Unsigned_1
simple_types.code: type Unsigned_1 is mod 2**1 with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: Unsigned_2
simple_types.code: type Unsigned_2 is mod 2**2 with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Unsigned_4
simple_types.code: type Unsigned_4 is mod 2**4 with Size => 4;

array_types.name: Byte_Array
array_types.code:
type Byte_Array is array (Index_Number range <>) of Byte
  with Component_Size => 8;

subtypes.name: Byte
subtypes.code:
subtype Byte is Interfaces.Unsigned_8
  with Object_Size => 8;

subtypes.name: Index_Number
subtypes.code: subtype Index_Number is Natural range 0 .. Natural'Last - 1;

subprograms.name: Rotate_Left_1
subprograms.code:
function Rotate_Left_1 (Value  : in Unsigned_1;
                        Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_1

subprograms.name: Rotate_Left_2
subprograms.code:
function Rotate_Left_2 (Value  : in Unsigned_2;
                        Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_2

subprograms.name: Rotate_Left_4
subprograms.code:
function Rotate_Left_4 (Value  : in Unsigned_4;
                        Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_4

subprograms.name: Shift_Left_1
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Left_1 (Value  : in Unsigned_1;
                       Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_1

subprograms.name: Shift_Left_2
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Left_2 (Value  : in Unsigned_2;
                       Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_2

subprograms.name: Shift_Left_4
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Left_4 (Value  : in Unsigned_4;
                       Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_4

subprograms.name: Shift_Right_1
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Right_1 (Value  : in Unsigned_1;
                        Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_1

subprograms.name: Shift_Right_2
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Right_2 (Value  : in Unsigned_2;
                        Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_2

subprograms.name: Shift_Right_4
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Right_4 (Value  : in Unsigned_4;
                        Amount : in Natural) return Unsigned_4
